title: Backrooms Realism
body:
## The Backrooms Yet Again
This is a modpack that _only_ uses one _horror_ Mod: [Minecraft Found Footage](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-found-footage/)
 
This Mod Introduces:\
new VHS effects
A built in Flashlight
Good looking Backrooms Generation
Random Events

~~There Currently are 4 Levels! Can you find them all and escape?~~

There are now 5 Levels! For a full changelog you can [view this](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-found-footage/changelog)
## Notes
- This mod WORKS in Mulitplayer and it is encouraged to play with Friends
- Some Features are only available in Mulitplayer
- Sodium and/or Iris WILL break the Mod
- The mod does not currently support integrated graphics
- Do not remove Veil's deferred resource pack
## Settings

F to toggle your flashlight
Render distance doesnt matter too much I believe, but I cant put sodium in here so.. yeah don't lag yourself out


If you have any Issues report it to me or the [Mod creator](https://github.com/SpacePotatoee/MinecraftFoundFootage) if you know its an issue with the Mod
